summary: Dataviz Horizontal Bar component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的水平长条竞赛图组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/dataviz-horizontal-bar/src/DatavizHorizontalBar.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `DatavizHorizontalBar` and `datavizHorizontalBarDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Dataviz Horizontal Bar Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/dataviz-horizontal-bar to my project. Preserve the exported DatavizHorizontalBarProps API and register the DatavizHorizontalBar composition with the default props.
